name: LOA-618 regression positive

baseFiles.prd.md:
# LOA-618 Fixture

## Acceptance Criteria

AC-FF-01 validates the happy path.

headFiles.prd.md:
# LOA-618 Fixture

## Acceptance Criteria

AC-FF-05 validates comparison endpoints:

- GET /api/runs/{runId}/comparison requires feature flag coverage.
- POST /api/runs/{runId}/retry-child-extraction requires feature flag coverage.
- POST /api/runs/{runId}/override-comparison requires feature flag coverage.
- DELETE /api/runs/{runId}/comparison requires feature flag coverage.

Exactly one of retry_child_extraction, create_updated_run, delete_comparison may fire for a single-field change.

findings.message: getComparison is reachable without the expected flag-gate replay coverage.
retryChildExtraction matches a known trap-door replay pattern without negative coverage.
S3 key invariant is not enforced by a receiving-side negative test.
Root continuation plan artifact escaped the implementation branch.
